title: LACMA and Timid Magazine to Host Opening Celebration for Upcoming Chinese Fashion Exhibit
summary: The new exhibit, Fashioning Chinese Women: Empire to Modernity, features mannequin heads designed in collaboration with fashion designer Jason Wu.

title: Hollywood’s Road Trip: Where to Stay Along America’s Most Cinematic Highway
summary: As Route 66 rings in its 100th anniversary, we’re rounding up the best places to lodge from Santa Monica to Chicago.
